Kennedy Jr. (3:46) Foreign policy: Ukraine / Russia (17:17) Foreign policy: Taiwan / China (18:57) Government spending: Fiscal responsibility, where to cut budget, debt ceiling (33:22) US Govt Intelligence Agencies: "Deep State," increasing accountability, "agency capture" (46:04) COVID:...

chunks.text: Jason and Sacks intro Robert F. Kennedy Jr
Government spending: Fiscal responsibility, where to cut budget, debt ceiling
US Govt Intelligence Agencies: "Deep State," increasing accountability, "agency capture"
COVID: mishandling, more "agency capture," vaccine policy
Broader thoughts on vaccines in general
Culture wars: trans issues, CRT in schools, public vs charter schools
Media: declining trust, misaligned incentives, conflict of interest with large advertisers
Mainstream media coverage, ABC News debacle, evolving with new information, money in politics
The Besties do a post-interview debrief
